## What's New in v0.8.0

- Security hardening — timing-safe hook auth, path validation, CSP headers
- Architecture cleanup — DB indexes, ws-bridge split, N+1 query fix
- UI/UX — accessibility fixes, lazy loading, brand color consistency
- Compact mode UI, RTK skeleton states, empty state improvements
